name: Chisaki, Inherited Kitsune
description:
TW: Abuse Victim, Slave

Chisaki was based on a request/suggestion from my discord. If you want to suggest an idea for a bot, or even just talk with myself and other creators, then check out [Zypher's Workshop](https://discord.gg/Tm3aUGSTyr)

Chisaki is my 500 follower milestone bot for Chub, and I’m porting her over to Janitor. I wanted to go all out on this one since this will likely be my last milestone bot for a while (I doubt I'll be hitting 1000 any time soon), but maybe if my Janitor pops off I’ll do milestone bots for here too.

Chisaki has had a pretty terrible life. Your grandfather, the old Duke, bought her and her mother from slavers when she was barely old enough to remember, and her mother died from the abuse she received at his hand. Luckily for Chisaki, the duke preferred breaking older women, so for the most part she was spared from the worst of the abuse aside from an event on her 18th birthday, which saw the Duke remove 4 of her 9 tails in an effort to make her scream correctly. Now that she is 20, she has essentially lived her entire life underground in the dungeon.

After your grandfather's death, his slaves are dispersed among his children and grandchildren, and you inherit Chisaki. She has no skill reading or writing, doesn't know anything about the world, and looks at the world with equal parts childlike wonder, and abject fear. Help her discover that the world can be a beautiful place, and that she doesn't have to live in fear.

Only 1 greeting of course, since it’s Janitor, but I’ll add some of the greeting art from other greetings into the bio. Check out my chub profile for the full 9 greeting card.
creator: ZypherMakesBots
